_backup_note: TARGET state of SyncView Calendar — Linear Issue Statuses (GP8CSZDNcy5sGdFr). An earlier meta-without-project version was applied + verified live 2026-06-14; this version ADDS hasProject and must be RE-APPLIED (paste the jsCode below into the 'Fetch Issue Statuses' node, restore the real key in place of [REDACTED-LINEAR-KEY], Save). Returns the unchanged statuses map PLUS meta:{IDENT:{state,isSubIssue,hasProject,hasDue,hasEditor}}. hasProject reflects the issue's OWN Linear project OR its parent's project (so a genuinely project-less sub-issue is flagged 'no project'; one that has/inherits a project is not) — this replaced the earlier approach that omitted project and treated it as present (which hid 'no project' on cards that really lacked one). The FE (loadCalendarPosts -> _calRefreshParentLinkFlags) uses this webhook as the SINGLE source for the incomplete-sub-issue banner across all linked cards (in-progress and Approved/Posted), so the banner is accurate + consistent. Additive + backward-compatible: statuses is unchanged. Rollback = linear-issue-statuses.2026-06-14.pre-meta.json. Read-only workflow; not on the dual-write list.
